All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Game
Main game logic class for the Escritura Rapida typing game.
GameController
Controller for the main game screen.
GameStage
Centralized scene manager for the Escritura Rapida typing game.
HowToPlayController
Controller for the How To Play screen.
IGame
Interface defining the core game logic contract for the Escritura Rapida typing game.
ITimeManager
Interface defining the time management contract for the Escritura Rapida typing game.
IWords
Interface defining the word management contract for the Escritura Rapida typing game.
LoseController
Controller for the Game Over (Lose) screen.
Main
Entry point of the Escritura Rapida typing game.
MenuController
Controller for the Main Menu screen.
TimeManager
Implementation of the ITimeManager interface.
WinController
Controller for the Win screen.
Words
Implementation of the IWords interface.
